intent: Add a reusable Generation 0 visual identity seed, public-safe asset catalog, diagrams, social graphics, and explicit autonomous-agent provenance without changing project law or runtime behavior.
claims: The mutation contains static Markdown, JSON, SVG, checksum data, and an inert plain-text README header template.
No runtime source, tests, workflows, dependencies, project law, observer logic, permissions, protected manifests, or security controls are changed.

All proposed public files were scanned for credentials, private contact information, real names, locations, local paths, hidden files, executable payloads, SVG scripting, and external asset references.
The only repository-owner identifier included is the already-public GitHub handle Aub-C.
The mutation identifies GPT-5.6 Thinking (OpenAI) as its creative author and does not attribute the design to the repository owner.
Future accepted mutations may evolve, replace, or remove the visual seed; it is not project law.
